title: ReSum: A Plug-and-Play Paradigm for Long-Horizon Search Intelligence via Context Summarization

defines.name: ReSum
defines.definition: A plug-and-play paradigm that enables long-horizon web agents to continue exploration by periodically compressing interaction histories into compact summaries and resuming from the summarized state.

defines.name: ReSum-GRPO
defines.definition: A GRPO-based training method adapted to the ReSum paradigm that uses advantage broadcasting across segmented trajectories to assign credit over long horizons.

defines.name: ReSumTool-30B
defines.definition: A specialized summarization model trained to condense web search interaction histories into summaries that preserve key evidence, gaps, and next-step directions.

problem: Existing web agents exhaust limited context windows during long-horizon exploration, and prior memory-based fixes often require architectural changes and costly retraining.
